curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The advisory references commit flarum/framework@440bed8 as the patch. Only one source file was changed: js/src/common/Translator.ts (renamed to .tsx). The patch escapes string parameters in the preprocessParameters method by wrapping them in JSX fragments before returning. The pre-patch code returned raw string parameters that were then rendered as HTML DOM nodes, enabling XSS. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2, narrowing to the translation parameter preprocessing subsystem. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class xss confirmed from CWE-79 and patch analysis.
